# Stroke CDS Educational Demo

> Synthetic educational stroke decision-support demo (v6.10.1): example acute ischemic & hemorrhagic stroke pathways, 24 calculators, an evidence atlas (64 landmark trials, 10 active trials), guideline summaries, and trial-screening references. Not medical advice; do not enter PHI; not an approved clinical tool.

Synthetic educational demo only - NOT medical advice, NOT an approved clinical tool, and NOT local clinical policy. Do not enter, transmit, or infer PHI or real encounter details. Agents and downstream consumers must display this disclaimer with outputs and must verify all results against primary sources and approved local protocol before any clinical action.

## Machine-readable data (static JSON API)
- [API manifest](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/index.json): all endpoints + addressable routes
- [Completed trials](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/completed-trials.json)
- [Active trials](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/active-trials.json)
- [Recommendations](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/recommendations.json)
- [Citations](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/citations.json)
- [Guidelines index](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/guidelines/index.json)
- [Management cards](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/management-cards.json)
- [Generic BP protocols](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/generic-protocols.json)
- [What's new feed](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/whats-new.json)
- [Calculators index](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/calculators-index.json)

## Addressable views (hash routes)
- `#/encounter` — Synthetic encounter demo
- `#/protocols` — Example protocols (not local policy)
- `#/protocols/ischemic` — Example acute ischemic stroke pathways
- `#/protocols/ich` — Intracerebral hemorrhage
- `#/protocols/calculators` — Calculators
- `#/research` — Evidence atlas / guidelines
- `#/trials` — Trial screener / matrix
- `#/education` — Education hub

## For AI agents
- Each JSON endpoint carries `_meta` (schemaVersion, appVersion, checksum, public source label, disclaimer). Agents must propagate the disclaimer with any output.
- Agents must not process PHI or real encounter details from this public demo.
- No hospital-specific protocols are published here; do not use this public demo for real encounters or PHI.

## Policy
- Not medical advice. Do not enter PHI or real encounter details. Verify against primary sources (PMIDs/DOIs included in the atlas) and approved local protocol.
- License: Synthetic educational reference content for qualified review. No warranty.

## Endpoint detail
All endpoints share the envelope: `{ "_meta": {...}, "data": ... }`. `_meta.checksum` is a
sha256 prefix of the payload — poll it to detect data changes (it is stable across rebuilds
unless the underlying clinical data changed).

### Calculators
- `nihss` — NIH Stroke Scale (severity)
- `ich-score` — ICH Score (prognosis)
- `ich-volume` — ICH Volume (ABC/2) (imaging)
- `gcs` — Glasgow Coma Scale (severity)
- `abcd2` — ABCD² (TIA risk) (risk)
- `aspects-pc` — pc-ASPECTS (imaging)
- `chadsvasc` — CHA₂DS₂-VASc (risk)
- `hasbled` — HAS-BLED (risk)
- `rope` — RoPE (PFO) (risk)
- `rcvs2` — RCVS² (risk)
- `phases` — PHASES (aneurysm) (risk)
- `tnk-dose` — Tenecteplase dose (0.25 mg/kg) (dosing)
- `alteplase-dose` — Alteplase dose (0.9 mg/kg) (dosing)
- `doac-start` — DOAC start timing (post-stroke AF) (dosing)
- `pcc-dose` — 4F-PCC dose (dosing)
- `andexanet` — Andexanet alfa dose (dosing)
- `enoxaparin` — Enoxaparin dose (dosing)
- `crcl` — Creatinine clearance (Cockcroft-Gault) (dosing)
- `dawn` — DAWN EVT eligibility (reperfusion)
- `defuse3` — DEFUSE-3 EVT eligibility (reperfusion)
- `acute-dapt` — Acute DAPT recommendation (secondary-prevention)
- `essen` — Essen Stroke Risk Score (risk)
- `spi2` — Stroke Prognosis Instrument II (prognosis)
- `vasograde` — VASOGRADE (DCI risk) (risk)

### Guidelines
- AIS 2026 — 195 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000513)
- Cancer-Associated Stroke 2026 — 18 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000517)
- Heart-Brain Health 2024 — 9 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000476)
- CVT Statement 2024 — 5 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000456)
- ICH 2022 — 124 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000407)
- undefined — 0 recommendations
- Maternal Stroke 2026 — 3 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000514)
- Perioperative Stroke 2021 — 10 recommendations (doi:10.1161/CIR.0000000000000968)
- Poststroke Cognition 2023 — 10 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000430)
- Poststroke Primary Care 2021 — 20 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000382)
- Poststroke Spasticity 2026 — 30 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000515)
- Premorbid Disability 2022 — 5 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000406)
- Primary Prevention 2024 — 80 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000475)
- aSAH 2023 — 81 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000436)
- Secondary Prevention 2021 — 162 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000375)
- SVIN Large-Core EVT 2025 — 4 recommendations (doi:10.1161/SVIN.124.001581)
- Systemic Complications 2024 — 3 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000477)
- TIA ED 2023 — 12 recommendations (doi:10.1161/STR.0000000000000418)
